text:
Sorry to hear you're locked out — that's frustrating, especially with four attempts and no code coming through on a working line.

Since this involves account access, we need to verify your identity through our security team before doing anything with 2FA — support can't bypass that step. I'm routing this to security ops now for that verification.

In the meantime, double-check the phone number on file is correct, and confirm you're not blocking short codes on your T-Mobile line. Someone will follow up with next steps.

Novig Support
